name: contract-first
description: Contract-First: define proto/openapi/asyncapi contract, write contract tests, then implement.

rules.guidance: The service contract (proto, OpenAPI, AsyncAPI, JSON Schema) must be committed before any implementation. No implementation without a reviewed contract.
Write consumer contract tests (Pact or equivalent) or server validation tests against the contract file before implementing the endpoint or message handler.
Breaking contract changes (removing fields, changing types, renaming operations) require a new version and a migration plan. Backward-compatible additions are preferred.
Contract files (*.proto, openapi.yaml, asyncapi.json) are versioned in the repository alongside the code. Generated code is derived from the contract, not the reverse.
